Let me start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me reason through the fix:

**What needs to change:**

1. **`footer` prop (line 44-46):** Move from a prop on `<Modal>` to a `<ModalFooter>` child component. The value `template && <TemplatesCatalogDrawerFooter .../>` becomes the children of `<ModalFooter>`.

2. **`header` prop (line 47-54):** Move from a prop on `<Modal>` to a `<ModalHeader>` child component. The value `<CatalogItemHeader .../>` becomes the children of `<ModalHeader>`.

3. **Imports:** Add `ModalBody, ModalHeader, ModalFooter` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

4. **Body wrapping:** The existing children (`<TemplatesCatalogDrawerPanel />`) should be wrapped in `<ModalBody>` per the v6 composition pattern.

Let me also check for the `aria-label` prop — in v6 Modal, `aria-label` stays on Modal, so that's fine.

Let me check the order: The v6 pattern shows `<ModalBody>`, `<ModalHeader>`, `<ModalFooter>` as children. Let me look at the target structure more carefully — it shows Header, then Body, then Footer conceptually, but the order within the Modal children is flexible. I'll use a logical order: ModalHeader, ModalBody, ModalFooter.

Now let me apply the changes:

arguments.after: import { Modal, ModalBody, ModalFooter, ModalHeader } from '@patternfly/react-core';

<Modal
        aria-label="Template drawer"
        className="pf-v6-c-modal-box ocs-modal co-catalog-page__overlay co-catalog-page__overlay--right template-catalog-drawer"
        disableFocusTrap
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={onClose}
      >
        <ModalHeader>
          <CatalogItemHeader
            className="co-catalog-page__overlay-header"
            iconImg={osIcon}
            title={templateName}
            vendor={template?.metadata?.name}
          />
        </ModalHeader>
        <ModalBody>
          <TemplatesCatalogDrawerPanel />
        </ModalBody>
        <ModalFooter>
          {template && <TemplatesCatalogDrawerFooter namespace={namespace} onCancel={handleCancel} />}
        </ModalFooter>
      </Modal>
arguments.before:
<Modal
        footer={
          template && <TemplatesCatalogDrawerFooter namespace={namespace} onCancel={handleCancel} />
        }
        header={
          <CatalogItemHeader
            className="co-catalog-page__overlay-header"
            iconImg={osIcon}
            title={templateName}
            vendor={template?.metadata?.name}
          />
        }
        aria-label="Template drawer"
        className="pf-v6-c-modal-box ocs-modal co-catalog-page__overlay co-catalog-page__overlay--right template-catalog-drawer"
        disableFocusTrap
        isOpen={isOpen}
        onClose={onClose}
      >
        <TemplatesCatalogDrawerPanel />
      </Modal>
